steps.title: Use both requested elements
steps.content: The student needs both an explanation of Aeolian landforms and an example. The relevant notes say Aeolian landforms are created by wind, and that mushroom rocks can form when wind erodes a rock's base and top at different rates.

steps.title: Reject incomplete uses
steps.content: A gives no concrete example. C mistakenly treats erosion, transportation, and deposition as examples of landforms. D gives only the mushroom-rock example and the Aeolus connection, not the broader explanation. The answer is B.
